intrigue.name: Ambush
intrigue.description: Combat: +4 strength.

intrigue.name: Allied Armada
intrigue.description: If you have a faction alliance: pay 2 spice to gain +7 strength.

intrigue.name: Bindu Suspension
intrigue.description: At the start of your turn: draw 1 card. You may pass your turn (instead of taking an Agent or Reveal turn).

intrigue.name: Bribery
intrigue.description: Pay 2 Solari to gain 1 influence with a faction of your choice.

intrigue.name: Bypass Protocol
intrigue.description: Acquire a card that costs 3 or less —OR— pay 2 spice to acquire a card that costs 5 or less to the top of your deck.

intrigue.name: Calculated Hire
intrigue.description: Pay 1 spice to take the Mentat from its designated space in the Landsraad.

intrigue.name: Charisma
intrigue.description: Gain 2 persuasion during your Reveal turn this round.

intrigue.name: CHOAM Shares
intrigue.description: Pay 7 Solari to gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Corner the Market
intrigue.description: Endgame: If you have at least two The Spice Must Flow, gain 1 VP. If you have more The Spice Must Flow than each opponent, gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Councilor’s Dispensation
intrigue.description: If you have a seat on the High Council: gain 2 spice.

intrigue.name: Dispatch an Envoy
intrigue.description: The card you play this turn has the following icons.

intrigue.name: Double Cross
intrigue.description: An opponent of your choice loses 1 troop in the Conflict and you deploy 1 troop from your supply to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Favored Subject
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Emperor.

intrigue.name: Guild Authorization
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Spacing Guild.

intrigue.name: Infiltrate
intrigue.description: Enemy Agents don’t block your next Agent at board spaces this turn.

intrigue.name: Know Their Ways
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Fremen.

intrigue.name: Master Tactician
intrigue.description: Combat: +3 strength —OR— Retreat up to three of your troops.

intrigue.name: Plans Within Plans
intrigue.description: Endgame: If you have 3+ influence on three faction tracks, gain 1 VP —OR— if you have 3+ influence on four faction tracks, gain 2 VP.

intrigue.name: Private Army
intrigue.description: Pay 2 spice to gain +5 strength.

intrigue.name: Rapid Mobilization
intrigue.description: Deploy any number of your garrisoned troops to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Recruitment Mission
intrigue.description: Gain 1 water during your Reveal turn this round. You may put cards you acquire on top of your deck.

intrigue.name: Refocus
intrigue.description: Shuffle your discard pile into your deck, then draw 1 card.

intrigue.name: Reinforcements
intrigue.description: Pay 3 Solari to gain 3 troops. If it’s your Reveal turn, you may deploy any of these troops to the Conflict.

intrigue.name: Secret of the Sisterhood
intrigue.description: Gain 1 influence with the Bene Gesserit.

intrigue.name: Staged Incident
intrigue.description: Lose three of your troops in the Conflict to gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: The Sleeper Must Awaken
intrigue.description: Pay 4 spice to gain 1 VP.

intrigue.name: Tiebreaker
intrigue.description: Combat: +2 strength —OR— Endgame: counts as 10 spice for tiebreakers.

intrigue.name: To the Victor…
intrigue.description: When you win a Conflict: gain 3 spice.

intrigue.name: Urgent Mission
intrigue.description: Recall one of your Agents.

intrigue.name: Water of Life
intrigue.description: Pay 1 water and 1 spice to draw 3 cards.

intrigue.name: Water Peddlers Union
intrigue.description: Gain 1 water.

intrigue.name: Windfall
intrigue.description: Gain 2 Solari.
